commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=03dfc9c575473629b3aded2f0ab53f23abc38532)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces two Feishu `response.json()` reads with byte-capped `readResponseWithLimit` calls and updates app-registration and streaming-card tests to use real `Response` objects plus overflow coverage.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +43. Total +61 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main has unbounded `response.json()` reads in the Feishu app-registration and streaming-card token paths, and the PR diff shows the new overflow path. I did not run a live Feishu/Lark tenant or OOM repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the branch has a concrete code defect plus missing external real behavior proof, and maintainers should choose whether this narrower PR or the broader overlapping PR is the right landing path.

target.title: fix(feishu): bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/feishu/src/app-registration.ts` and `extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.ts` call raw `response.json()` without a byte cap on Feishu API responses. Feishu app registration polls and token responses can grow unexpectedly; without a cap the plugin risks OOM.

## Changes

- `fetchFeishuJson` (app-registration.ts): replace `response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit` capped at 4 MiB
- `resolveStreamingTenantToken` (streaming-card.ts): replace `response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit` capped at 1 MiB  
- Test updates: bounded JSON overflow tests + migrate plain-object mocks to `new Response()` (compatible with `readResponseWithLimit`)

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Unit tests — vitest + real Response objects

```
$ pnpm exec vitest run extensions/feishu/src/app-registration.test.ts extensions/feishu/src/streaming-card.test.ts

 ✓ rejects oversized app-registration JSON responses
 ✓ rejects oversized app-registration JSON via real response size
 ... (all existing tests pass)

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  23 passed (23)
```

The overflow test constructs a >4 MiB body via `new Response(largeBody, {...})` and verifies the bounded reader rejects with "Feishu app-registration response too large". Normal under-cap parsing continues to work unchanged.
